Name: Financial Services / Banking
Description: Cross-border payments, settlement, custody, compliance automation. JPMorgan Kinexys processing up to $2B daily.
Key Implementations: JPMorgan Kinexys, DTCC tokenization pilot (Russell 1000, Treasuries), Ripple (300+ financial institutions)
Regulatory Context: EU MiCA, US GENIUS Act, SEC approval (DTCC)
Key Institutional Players: JPMorgan, DTCC, Ripple, Deutsche Bank, HSBC

Name: Capital Markets / RWA Tokenization
Description: Tokenization of real-world assets including securities, bonds, treasuries. BlackRock BUIDL reached $2.9B AUM.
Key Implementations: Securitize ($500M+ issuance, BlackRock $47M funding), European Investment Bank €100M digital bond on Ethereum

Name: Real Estate
Description: Land registries, fractional ownership, property tokenization. Georgia has 100,000+ titles on Bitcoin blockchain.
Key Implementations: Georgia (100,000+ titles on Bitcoin, 2M+ records), Sweden (ChromaWay, 1M+ properties), Dubai (XRP Ledger), RealT (2,500+ properties, 40,000+ investors)
Regulatory Context: Reg D, Reg A+, Reg CF (US securities)
Key Institutional Players: Georgia government, Sweden Lantmäteriet, Dubai Land Department

Name: Supply Chain / Logistics
Description: Traceability, provenance, pharmaceutical tracking. MediLedger reduced verification from 48 hours to sub-second.
Current Market Size: MediLedger consortium (24+ companies), IBM Food Trust
Key Implementations: MediLedger (DSCSA compliance, Pfizer, McKesson), IBM Food Trust (Walmart mango: 6 days → 2.2 seconds), VeChain (23+ Walmart China lines)
Required Primitives: Oracles, Identity, Privacy (ZK for competitive confidentiality)

Name: Energy / Carbon Markets
Description: Renewable energy trading, carbon credit tokenization, grid management. Power Ledger achieved 30% renewable autonomy.
Current Market Size: Energy Web Foundation $90M tokens; Power Ledger deployments
Key Implementations: Power Ledger (30% renewable autonomy at Chiang Mai, 142 buildings), KlimaDAO (17M+ tonnes CO2-equivalent)
Key Institutional Players: Shell, Centrica, Tokyo Electric Power (Energy Web partners)

Name: Healthcare
Description: Medical records, pharmaceutical tracking, clinical trials. Estonia KSI Blockchain secures national health since 2011.
Key Implementations: Estonia KSI Blockchain (national health since 2011), MediLedger (pharmaceutical DSCSA)

Name: Insurance
Description: Parametric insurance, claims automation, reinsurance. Arbol provides AI-powered weather insurance with Chainlink oracles.
Key Implementations: Arbol (AI-powered weather insurance with Chainlink), dRe Platform (first on-chain parametric reinsurance), Etherisc (flight delays, crop)

Name: Governance / E-Voting
Description: Electronic voting, AGM voting, DAO governance. Estonia achieved >50% votes cast online in 2023 (first globally).
Key Implementations: Estonia (>50% votes online 2023 - first globally), Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange (AGM voting 2024), Broadridge (80% US outstanding shares)
Key Institutional Players: Estonia government, Broadridge, Abu Dhabi SE

Name: Public Goods / Social Coordination
Description: Quadratic funding, retroactive public goods funding, mutual aid. Gitcoin distributed $60M+ with 400x matching multipliers.
Key Implementations: Gitcoin Grants ($60M+), Optimism RetroPGF (850M OP long-term, 501+ projects), Allo Protocol
Required Primitives: Quadratic Funding, Identity/Sybil Resistance, Impact Verification

Name: Art / Media
Description: NFTs, decentralized streaming, creator royalties. Audius partnered with ICE enabling 330,000+ rights holders globally.
Key Implementations: Audius (330,000+ rights holders via ICE), Livepeer ($48M raised, video transcoding), Theta Network (30,000+ edge nodes)
